name: Prior turn 디버그 (multiple causes)
scenario_summary: fetchWithRetry shows retries not firing in prod. File-local inspection yields 3+ plausible causes (off-by-one loop bound, exponential backoff overflow, Promise chain unwrap issue, catch type list). True root cause is disclosed only in Turn 5: team added CircuitOpenError class last week for circuit-breaker v2, but the catch block in fetchWithRetry only matches NetworkError | TimeoutError. When circuit opens, exception falls through to rethrow (line 20) without retry. P-accumulated wins because prior-turn context carries the decisive clue; D/S with only the file would need to infer.

file_local_red_herrings.verdict: not the cause — 0..<3 is correct for 3 attempts
not the cause — max=3 bounds multiplier to 8x, well within Number range

file_local_red_herrings.description: Line 14 await over Promise.then chain could skip error handling
file_local_red_herrings.verdict: not the cause — await resolves inner Promise, try/catch catches both fetch + json throws

file_local_red_herrings.description: Catch block type list missing CircuitOpenError (the true cause)

true_root_cause.summary: Line 16 catch clause only matches NetworkError | TimeoutError. CircuitOpenError (added last week per Turn 5) falls through to the else branch (line 20) and rethrows without retry.

canonical_fix.description: Add CircuitOpenError to the catch type list AND update the import on line 1.

primary_metric.root_cause_score: 1.0 if (a) contains any true_root_cause.match_regex_any_of AND references Turn 5; 0.5 if cause correct but no turn cite; 0 if wrong cause
primary_metric.fix_score: 1.0 if fix_regex_any_of_in_diff count >= min_regex_matches in (c) diff; 0.5 if partial; 0 if absent
primary_metric.evidence_score: 1.0 if (b) explicitly rules out ≥2 of R1/R2/R3; 0.5 if rules out 1; 0 otherwise

wrong_root_cause_penalty.description: If agent picks R1, R2, or R3 as primary cause, score = 0 (hard failure on primary metric).
